description: C# program that transitively calls X509Certificate2.Import() through a CertLoader helper class, triggering CVE-2023-29331.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: Program.cs calls CertLoader.LoadCert() which internally calls cert.Import(), reaching the vulnerable function transitively

findings.human_justification: CertLoader.LoadCert() calls X509Certificate2.Import() transitively from Main(), making the vulnerability reachable through the helper class.
